title: ajuga laxmannii
intro: Ajuga laxmannii, also known as Bugleweed or Carpathian bugle, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to reduce anxiety and insomnia by inhibiting the thyroid-stimulating hormone. The health benefits of Ajuga laxmannii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. Ajuga laxmannii is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment.
